analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet praises former Directors-General of the EU and endorses Stefano Manservisi’s comment as “absolutely right, calm and strong, a lesson,” implying confidence in experienced EU leadership. Evaluation: EU1 (EU is a successful story) – Indirectly supported: praising “some of the best DG’s in the history of the EU” suggests a positive, successful institutional history. EU2 (EU is united) – Not indicated: no mention of unity, agreements, or solidarity among member states. EU3 (EU is useful for its citizens) – Not indicated: no policies or citizen benefits referenced. EU4 (EU avant-garde) – Not indicated: no pioneering policy or leadership claim. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – Not indicated: no human rights or democracy themes. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Not indicated: no global contributions mentioned. Conclusion: Only EU1 is weakly but plausibly promoted.
